youtube_shorts.title: Cách pha Trà Bắc chuẩn vị

facebook_reel.caption: Bí quyết pha trà Bắc của bà

shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic vertical 9:16 keyframe: an elderly Vietnamese woman (Lan) sits at a low wooden table in a traditional northern living room, warm morning light, a lacquer tray with a small clay teapot and the Tra Bac tea box in frame, shallow depth of field, photoreal, no text.
shots.video_prompt: Lan slowly lifts the clay teapot and pours steaming tea into a small cup, gentle steam rising, warm morning light, subtle camera push-in, photoreal, natural motion. Dialogue (Vietnamese): "Trà này pha đúng kiểu Bắc mới ngon."
shots.dialogue: Trà này pha đúng kiểu Bắc mới ngon.

shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic vertical 9:16 keyframe: Minh (young man) sits across the table, receives the cup of tea with both hands, respectful posture, same northern living room, warm light, photoreal, no text.
shots.video_prompt: Minh receives the cup with both hands, takes a small sip, nods with a warm smile, same warm interior, subtle handheld feel, photoreal. Dialogue (Vietnamese): "Thơm thật bà ạ."
